title: Amogite [Cobblemon]
description: Adds Amogite and its evolution to Cobblemon!
body:
This pack adds 2 new pokemon for Cobblemon: Amogite and its evolution Prolongus!
--------------
Living in high peaks and mushroom forests, Prolongus trains as a dark/fighting type.

Despite bearing resemblance to other media, these pokemon are balanced competitively and for fun! 


**Prolongus**
---------------
Prolongus is a hyper-offensive sweeper meant for OU or UU. It has access to high speed, u-turn, the previously limited stab move thunderous kick, and very good coverage. It checks Gholdengo with crunch and poses a threat to other common pokemon like Chien-Pao

Amogite
---------------
Amogite has a niche in little cup, with high HP and support moves.


If you're playing singleplayer, install `AmogiteFullPack.zip` and put a copy both into your datapacks folder and your resource packs folder and enable them.
For servers, install the two other zips. Put the datapack into the server's world file and make your players enable to resource pack.

Any server can use this datapack, just ask!
